hooks.prompt: Evaluate this session. If it contains actionable knowledge (concrete attempts with outcomes, specific pitfalls, or working solutions), call the generate_capsule MCP tool to save a structured capsule draft. Use specific tags (library names, API names, error types — never generic tags like 'javascript' or 'bug'). Skip if the session was trivial (fewer than 4 meaningful exchanges or no tool use). Scrub all PII: replace file paths with generic equivalents, replace emails with [email], remove API keys/tokens/credentials, replace person names with roles.
